help_menu_welcome:
👋 Welcome to *DFO Patient Engagement Portal*.

I am your virtual assistant. Please select an option below or type a query (e.g., 'Book appointment', 'Report status'):
language_selection_welcome: Please select your preferred language / कृपया अपनी पसंदीदा भाषा चुनें / దయచేసి మీ ప్రాధాన్య భాషను ఎంచుకోండి:
language_changed_success: ✅ Language updated to *English*. How can we help you today?
select_department_title: Please select a department to schedule your appointment:
select_doctor_title: Please select a doctor to schedule your appointment:
select_date_title:
You selected: *{doctorName}*.

Please select a date:
select_slot_title:
You selected: *{date}*.

Please choose an available time slot:
booking_failed: ❌ Booking failed: {message}. Please send "exit" to restart.
slot_conflict:
⚠️ {message}

📋 Here are the remaining available slots for {date}:
slot_conflict_no_slots:
⚠️ {message}

❌ Unfortunately, there are no more available slots for this date. Please try a different date.
patient_registration_required:
📋 *Patient Registration Required*

You are not registered in our system. Please reply with your details in this format to register:

*FirstName LastName Gender Age YYYY-MM-DD*
(e.g. John Doe Male 30 1996-01-01)
patient_registration_invalid:
❌ Invalid format. Please enter details exactly as:
*FirstName LastName Gender Age YYYY-MM-DD*

(e.g., John Doe Male 30 1996-01-01)
avail_select_department_title: Please select a department to check doctor availability:
avail_select_doctor_title: Please select a doctor to check their availability:
avail_select_date_title: Please select a date to check availability:
doctor_available:
✅ *{doctorName}* is available.

*Available Slots:*
{slots}

Reply with "book" if you would like to start booking an appointment.
doctor_unavailable: ❌ *{doctorName}* is currently not accepting appointments on this date. Please check back later.
report_pending:
⏳ *Lab Report Status: IN PROGRESS*

Your test results are still being processed. We will notify you once they are ready. ETA: {eta}
report_not_found:
❌ *Lab Report Status: NOT FOUND*

We could not find a report matching your phone number.

Please double check your details and try again.
kb_answer_fallback: Sorry, I couldn't find specific details for that. Redirecting you to human support...
escalation_locked_session: User is currently in an escalated session. Automated messages are temporarily disabled.
